steps.name: Set text: G1_FL on element By.xpath: //input[@id='Username']
Set text: Tv@123 on element By.xpath: //input[@id='Password']
Click element: By.xpath: //span[normalize-space()='Thông tin giao hàng'] with time out 3
Click element: By.xpath: //a[normalize-space()='Phiếu giao hàng'] with time out 3
Click element: By.xpath: //label[contains(text(),'Mã thẻ thành viên')]
Set text: Rosy Dương on element By.xpath: //input[@id='CustomerName']
Set text: HD6512381 on element By.xpath: //input[@id='BillCode']
Click element: By.xpath: //span[normalize-space()='Chọn mã sản phẩm']
Set text: 023 on element By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Nhập từ khóa tìm kiếm']
Set text: A on element By.xpath: //tbody//th[4]/input
Set text: FL on element By.xpath: //tbody//th[5]/input
Check Element By.xpath: //h2[contains(text(),'Danh Sách Phiếu Giao Hàng')] Exist
Set text: Rosy Dương on element By.xpath: //input[@id='customer_name']
